chapter_title.en: Chapter 87 – Limit of the breast-feeding which (makes marriage to be) Prohibited

text: الْحُسَيْنُ بْنُ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنْ مُعَلَّى بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنِ الْحَسَنِ بْنِ عَلِيِّ بْنِ فَضَّالٍ عَنْ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ سِنَانٍ عَنْ عُمَرَ بْنِ يَزِيدَ قَالَ سَأَلْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) عَنِ الْغُلَامِ يَرْضَعُ الرَّضْعَةَ وَ الرَّضْعَتَيْنِ فَقَالَ لَا يُحَرِّمُ فَعَدَدْتُ عَلَيْهِ حَتَّى أَكْمَلْتُ عَشْرَ رَضَعَاتٍ فَقَالَ إِذَا كَانَتْ مُتَفَرِّقَةً [فَلَا] .

en.hubeali: Al Husayn Bin Muhammad, from Moalla Bin Muhammad, from Al Hassan Bin Ali Bin Fazzal, from Abdullah Bin Sinan, from Umar Bin Yazeed who said,

‘I asked Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> about the boy who is breast-fed the breast-feeding session, and the two breast-feeding sessions. So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘It does not make a Prohibition’. So I counted to him until I completed ten breast-feeding sessions. So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘If it was separated, so no’.
